name: Spicy Beef and Bean Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can (11 1/2 oz.) bean with bacon soup, undiluted
1 jar (16 oz.) thick and chunky picante sauce, divided
1 can (16 oz.) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (15 oz.) black beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (2 1/4 oz.) sliced ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef and garlic in a skillet until the beef is browned; drain excess fat.
2. In a large bowl, combine soup, 1 cup of picante sauce, cornstarch, parsley, paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Fold in beans, 1 1/4 cups of cheese, 1/2 cup sliced green onions, and the beef mixture.
4. Place the bottom pastry into a pie plate and fill with bean mixture.
5. Top with remaining pastry; seal and flute edges.
6. Cut slits in the top crust.
7. Bake at 425°F for 30-35 minutes or until lightly browned. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
8. Garnish with sour cream, olives, remaining picante sauce, cheese, and onions.
